label: Statistics & experimental design

node.label: Statistics & experimental design
node.definition: Estimation, hypothesis testing, sampling, and experimental design connect finite observations to general claims.
node.why_it_matters: The role of Statistics & experimental design is to connect Probability theory to downstream capabilities including Causal inference, Databases & information retrieval, Datasets, sampling & splits.
limitations: Its abstractions require explicit assumptions; a mathematically valid result can still be irrelevant to a mismatched empirical setting. Its direct dependencies include Probability theory.

dependencies.rationale: Statistics & experimental design rests on the formal or computational capabilities supplied by Probability theory.

sentence_units.text: Estimation, hypothesis testing, sampling, and experimental design connect finite observations to general claims.
The role of Statistics & experimental design is to connect Probability theory to downstream capabilities including Causal inference, Databases & information retrieval, Datasets, sampling & splits.
Its abstractions require explicit assumptions; a mathematically valid result can still be irrelevant to a mismatched empirical setting. Its direct dependencies include Probability theory.
Statistics & experimental design rests on the formal or computational capabilities supplied by Probability theory.
